name: Form: Add Field

description.en: Add an input field to an existing form.
description.de: Ein Eingabefeld zu einem bestehenden Formular hinzufügen.

bot: Use this to add a field to a form. Call form-get first to read the current definition, then append the new field to definition.actions[0].inputs and submit the full updated definition.

inputs.name: Form ID
inputs.bot: The form's ID. Never ask the user — carry it from the previous step.

inputs.name: Definition
inputs.bot: The full updated warp definition with the new field appended to definition.actions[0].inputs. Preserve all existing fields.
